project_root.description: Absolute path to the project root (e.g. /Users/stephencheng/Projects/CyberSkill/cyberos).

scope.description: Project flavor. 'auto' detects by file signatures (presence of task-audit skill or the legacy task-audit skill → cyberos; else generic). 'cyberos' or 'generic' force the flavor.

dry_run.description: If true: report what would be done without mutating any file.

absorb_threshold_lines.description: Markdown files smaller than this many lines are candidates for absorption into a parent doc.

leftover_patterns.description: Glob patterns for suspicious leftover files. Operator can override per-invocation.

exclude_paths.description: Paths to skip entirely during scan.
